tags.name: Royal Ballet and Opera gift shop
tags.wheelchair:description: Main Entrance from Bow Street has wide sliding doors to main level & café/bar. Internal ramps along south wall link main level with lower shop level. Shop entrance from Plaza has button operated door. WCs not checked.

tags.name: London Transport Museum Shop
tags.note: Shop in the museum selling TfL themed gifts etc, also a large range of transport books. Can be accessed for free without visiting the museum.
